# ורד חסון נומרולוגית, מרצה ומאמנת אישית. — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Vered Hasson is a numerologist, lecturer, and personal coach who specializes in creating clarity for people who want to move forward in life. Her brand combines professional credibility with personal empowerment, targeting individuals aged 20-50 as well as large organizations. She offers lectures, workshops, and personal coaching sessions, all centered around the theme of personal development. The brand's tone is elegant, trustworthy, and inspirational, with a focus on driving action through compelling calls-to-action, testimonials, and video content.

---

מוכנים לפרוץ דרך? ורד חסון, מאמנת אישית מובילה, מזמינה אתכם להרצאות, סדנאות ואימון אישי שיעניקו לכם בהירות וכוח לנוע קדימה. הצטרפו עכשיו!

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://-244a38d6.zappy5.app
- Endpoint: https://-244a38d6.zappy5.app/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About ורד חסון נומרולוגית, מרצה ומאמנת אישית.
Vered Hasson is a numerologist, lecturer, and personal coach who specializes in creating clarity for people who want to move forward in life. Her brand combines professional credibility with personal empowerment, targeting individuals aged 20-50 as well as large organizations. She offers lectures, workshops, and personal coaching sessions, all centered around the theme of personal development. The brand's tone is elegant, trustworthy, and inspirational, with a focus on driving action through compelling calls-to-action, testimonials, and video content.

## Target Audience
- גברים ונשים בגילאי 20-50 המעוניינים בהתפתחות אישית, ארגונים גדולים
- תוכניות רווחה ארגוניות
- התפתחות אישית
- סדנאות, הרצאות, אימון אישי
- נומרולוגיה

## Industry
Personal Development & Coaching
